name: devolens
description: Devolens licensing skills for license key verification, offline license verification, floating licenses, trials, feature gates, subscriptions, key generation, payment automation, and Cryptolens SDK integrations.

interface.longDescription: Adds Devolens licensing guidance for license key verification, offline fallback, floating licenses, trials, feature-gated licensing, subscriptions, backend key generation, payment automation, and .NET, Java, and Python SDK integrations.
defaultPrompt: Create license keys from my backend.
Integrate Devolens with Stripe, n8n, Zapier, or another payment provider.
